notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Spencer Arrighetti on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman hit by pitch. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya singles on a fly ball to center fielder Jake Meyers.

notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros flies out to center fielder Jake Meyers.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Jeremy Peña. Carson Kelly to 3rd. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Isaac Paredes scores. Jake Meyers to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Jeremy Peña. Carson Kelly to 3rd. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
